generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about civil defense spending, but let's be real - we're talking about basic preparedness here, not some wild military buildup. My neighbor lost everything in the last flood and told me firsthand how slow the response was. We're not asking for much, just reasonable funding so communities can actually protect themselves when things go wrong. It's not about big government, it's about being neighborly and looking out for each other. #CommunityFirst #PreparedNotParanoid
